Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class ContractFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.ContractFactory
public class ContractFactory extends Object
Contracts should only be created through methods of this class

  • Constructor Details

    • ContractFactory

      public ContractFactory(Services services)
      Creates a new contract factory.
      Parameters:
      services - the services object

  • Method Details

    • addPost

      public FunctionalOperationContract addPost(FunctionalOperationContract old, Term addedPost, ProgramVariable selfVar, ProgramVariable resultVar, ProgramVariable excVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars)
      Returns another contract like this one, except that the passed term has been added as a postcondition (regardless of termination case).
      Parameters:
      old - the old contract
      addedPost - the post condition to be added
      selfVar - the used self variable
      resultVar - the used result variable
      excVar - the used exception variable
      paramVars - the used program variables
      atPreVars - the used pre-heap variables
      Returns:
      the resulting contract

    • addPost

      public FunctionalOperationContract addPost(FunctionalOperationContract old, InitiallyClause ini)
      Add the specification contained in InitiallyClause as a postcondition.
      Parameters:
      old - the old contract
      ini - the initially clause to be added
      Returns:
      the resulting contract

    • addPre

      public FunctionalOperationContract addPre(FunctionalOperationContract old, Term addedPre, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars)
      Returns another contract like this one, except that the passed term has been added as a precondition.
      Parameters:
      old - the old contract
      addedPre - precondition to be added
      selfVar - used self variable
      paramVars - used program variables
      atPreVars - used pre-heap variables
      Returns:
      the resulting contract

    • addGlobalDefs

      public FunctionalOperationContract addGlobalDefs(FunctionalOperationContract opc, Term globalDefs)
      Add global variable definitions (aka. old clause) to the contract.
      Parameters:
      opc - the functional method contract
      globalDefs - the global variable definitions
      Returns:
      the resulting method contract

    • funcBlock

      public FunctionalBlockContract funcBlock(BlockContract blockContract)
      Create a new FunctionalBlockContract from an existing BlockContract.
      Parameters:
      blockContract - the BlockContract.
      Returns:
      a new FunctionalBlockContract.

      public FunctionalLoopContract funcLoop(LoopContract loopContract)
      Create a new FunctionalLoopContract from an existing LoopContract.
      Parameters:
      loopContract - the LoopContract.
      Returns:
      a new FunctionalLoopContract.

    • func

      public FunctionalOperationContract func(IProgramMethod pm, InitiallyClause ini) throws SLTranslationException
      Create a new FunctionalOperationContract from an existing IProgramMethod and InitiallyClause.
      Parameters:
      pm - the IProgramMethod.
      ini - the InitiallyClause.
      Returns:
      a new FunctionalOperationContract.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - in case translating the initially clause fails.

    • func

      public FunctionalOperationContract func(String baseName, KeYJavaType kjt, IProgramMethod pm, Modality modality, Map<LocationVariable,Term> pres, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePres, Term mby, Map<LocationVariable,Term> posts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePosts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> axioms, Map<LocationVariable,Term> mods, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freeMods, Map<ProgramVariable,Term> accs, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasMod, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasFreeMod, ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, ProgramVariable resultVar, ProgramVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, boolean toBeSaved)
      Creates a new functional operation contract.
      Parameters:
      baseName - base name of the contract (does not have to be unique)
      kjt - the KeYJavaType of the class
      pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
      modality - the modality of the contract
      pres - the precondition of the contract
      freePres - the free/unchecked precondition of the contract
      mby - the measured_by clause of the contract
      posts - the postcondition of the contract
      freePosts - the free/unchecked postcondition of the contract
      axioms - the class axioms of the method
      mods - the modifies clause of the contract
      freeMods - the free modifies clause of the contract
      accs - the dependency clause of the contract
      hasMod - whether the contract has a modifies set
      hasFreeMod - whether the contract has a free modifies set
      selfVar - the self variable
      paramVars - the parameter variables
      resultVar - the exception variable
      excVar - the result variable
      atPreVars - a map of all pre-heap variables
      toBeSaved - TODO
      Returns:
      the resulting functional operation contract

    • func

      public FunctionalOperationContract func(String baseName, IProgramMethod pm, boolean terminates, Map<LocationVariable,Term> pres, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePres, Term mby, Map<LocationVariable,Term> posts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePosts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> axioms, Map<LocationVariable,Term> mods, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freeMods, Map<ProgramVariable,Term> accessibles, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasMod, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasFreeMod, ProgramVariableCollection pv)
      Creates a new functional operation contract.
      Parameters:
      baseName - base name of the contract (does not have to be unique)
      pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
      terminates - a boolean determining whether we also prove termination
      pres - the precondition of the contract
      freePres - the free/unchecked precondition of the contract
      mby - the measured_by clause of the contract
      posts - the postcondition of the contract
      freePosts - the free/unchecked postcondition of the contract
      axioms - the class axioms of the method
      mods - the modifies clause of the contract
      freeMods - the free modifies clause of the contract
      accessibles - the dependency clause of the contract
      hasMod - whether the contract has a modifies set
      hasFreeMod - whether the contract has a modifies set
      pv - a collection of the program variables
      Returns:
      the resulting functional operation contract

    • func

      public FunctionalOperationContract func(String baseName, IProgramMethod pm, Modality modality, Map<LocationVariable,Term> pres, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePres, Term mby, Map<LocationVariable,Term> posts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freePosts, Map<LocationVariable,Term> axioms, Map<LocationVariable,Term> mods, Map<LocationVariable,Term> freeMods, Map<ProgramVariable,Term> accessibles, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasMod, Map<LocationVariable,Boolean> hasFreeMod, ProgramVariableCollection progVars, boolean toBeSaved, boolean transaction)
      Creates a new functional operation contract.
      Parameters:
      baseName - base name of the contract (does not have to be unique)
      pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
      modality - the modality of the contract
      pres - the precondition of the contract
      freePres - the free/unchecked precondition of the contract
      mby - the measured_by clause of the contract
      posts - the postcondition of the contract
      freePosts - the free/unchecked postcondition of the contract
      axioms - the class axioms of the method
      mods - the modifies clause of the contract
      freeMods - the free modifies clause of the contract
      accessibles - the dependency clause of the contract
      hasMod - whether the contract has a modifies set
      hasFreeMod - whether the contract has a modifies set
      progVars - the program variables
      toBeSaved - TODO
      transaction - TODO
      Returns:
      the resulting functional operation contract

    • union

      public FunctionalOperationContract union(FunctionalOperationContract... contracts)
      Returns the union of the passed contracts. Probably you want to use SpecificationRepository.combineContracts() instead, which additionally takes care that the combined contract can be loaded later. The resulting contract has id "INVALID_ID".
      Parameters:
      contracts - the passed contracts
      Returns:
      the union contract

      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

      public static String generateContractTypeName(String baseName, KeYJavaType forClass, IObserverFunction target, KeYJavaType specifiedIn)
